extraction.one_line_summary: KANTER Max won Stage 6 sprint after HOFSTETTER Hugo was disqualified for irregular sprinting, contested finish ending left side of road.
tactical_patterns: KANTER recovered from illness-induced poor form mid-stage race to win, showing late-race recovery trajectory possible within same event.
Finish line positioning critical: sprint initiated right side but winner emerged left, indicating late diagonal moves yield disqualification risk.

rider_signals.KANTER Max: positive: rebounded from illness and poor Stage 5 to win Stage 6, demonstrates resilience within multi-day events
rider_signals.HOFSTETTER Hugo: negative: disqualified for irregular sprint despite crossing line first, positioning decisions cost certain victory
